event_comments:
Published source mixes general Winter O' Series classes, O' Series points classes, and WIOL school categories on one page.
Source uses decimal-style time formatting such as 10.18 and 45.55; values are preserved source-literal in time_text.
Final Varsity Boys row is a non-competitive source line beginning with raw place text 'NC'.
Elementary Boys place 7 has an apparent source inconsistency: result 16.40 but loss 6.22.
